class Solution:
    def minDays(self, n: int) -> int:
        steps = 0
        while n > 0:
            if n % 3 == 0:
                steps +=1
                n = n //3
            elif n %2 ==0:
                if (n-1) %3 ==0:
                    steps +=2
                    n = (n-1)//3
                else:
                    steps +=1
                    n = n//2
            else:
                steps +=1
                n -=1
        return steps
